title: Version DAO receive persistence as DRX2
description: Change scope-bound DAO receive high-water magic to provisional DRX2 and document DTX2/DRX2 as unshipped scope-bound formats, with no migration or fabricated scope.
acceptance_criteria: Old records fail closed explicitly; DRX2 round-trips scope and high-water; comments/docs identify provisional scope-bound format version.
close_reason: Changed provisional scope-bound DAO RX high-water magic to DRX2, documented DTX2/DRX2 no-migration policy, and added valid DRX1 fail-closed/non-overwrite test. Full lichen-rpl suite passes.
